summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Arcolia landing page with MetaMask wallet integration. All core functionality working correctly including landing page display, Enter Arcolia button interaction, wallet connect section, and MetaMask not installed error handling.
passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with medieval gate background image
Title 'Arcolia' and subtitle 'Access Without Permission' present in DOM
Enter Arcolia button visible and clickable
Wallet connect section appears after clicking Enter Arcolia
Wallet status displays 'Connect your wallet to enter' message
Button correctly changes to 'Install MetaMask' when MetaMask not detected
Error message displays correctly: 'MetaMask is not installed. Please install it to continue.'
Install MetaMask button clickable (attempts to open metamask.io in new tab)
Wallet info and disconnect sections properly hidden when not connected
All data-testid attributes present for testing
